help_dialog.title: Game guide
help_dialog.intro_summary: Among Liars is a multiplayer social deduction game. Each player is dealt a secret role from one of four factions — Town, Mafia, Cult, Neutrals — each with its own abilities, objectives and interactions. At night every role acts in parallel in a strict priority order; during the day players debate, accuse and vote. The game alternates day/night cycles until one faction meets its win condition. The depth comes from the chain: who blocks whom, who detects what, who survives which attack.
help_dialog.intro: Among Liars is a social deduction game. Each player receives a secret role.
help_dialog.town_desc: The Town must identify and eliminate threats.
help_dialog.mafia_desc: The Mafia eliminates villagers at night while staying hidden.
help_dialog.phase_night: Night — Each player uses their power in secret. The Mafia chooses a target to eliminate.
help_dialog.phase_report: Report — The village discovers the night's victims.
help_dialog.phase_discussion: Discussion — Debate, accuse, defend yourself. Use chat or voice.
help_dialog.phase_vote: Vote — Vote against a suspect. A majority is needed to accuse.
help_dialog.phase_defense: Defense — The accused gets a last chance to defend themselves.
help_dialog.phase_judgment: Judgment — Vote Guilty or Innocent. If guilty, the player is executed.
help_dialog.win_town: Town — Eliminate all Mafia members and neutral threats.
help_dialog.win_mafia: Mafia — Reach majority over other players.
help_dialog.win_cult: Cult — Convert enough players to reach majority.
help_dialog.win_sk: Serial Killer — Be the last one standing.
help_dialog.win_survivor: Survivor — Stay alive until the end.
help_dialog.cmd_pm: -pm player message — Send a private message to a player
help_dialog.cmd_lw: -lw text — Write your last will (revealed upon death)
help_dialog.cmd_skip: -skip — Vote to skip the discussion phase

role_stats.title: Your role statistics
role_stats.empty: No games recorded yet. Play a few rounds to see your per-role stats here.
role_stats.hint: Stats are stored locally on this browser.

tutorial.title: How to play?
tutorial.step1_body: Every player is dealt a secret role: Town (good guys), Mafia (coordinated killers), Cult (converters) or Neutral (solo goals). Only your own team knows your role.
tutorial.step2_body: You pick a target to use your ability: kill, heal, investigate, block... Actions resolve in a strict priority order (blockers first, killers next, investigators last). The morning reveals who died.
tutorial.step3_body: Talk, accuse, defend yourself. A majority vote sends a player to trial. The accused defends then is judged guilty or innocent. A guilty verdict = execution — careful with innocents.
tutorial.step4_title: Each faction has its own win condition
tutorial.step4_body: Town wins by eliminating every threat. Mafia/Cult win by becoming the majority. Neutrals each have their own condition (the Jester wants to get lynched, the Survivor just wants to stay alive). Aim for YOUR role's condition.
tutorial.guide_hint: Once in-game, open the menu → "Game guide" for role-by-role details.

game_tutorial.title: Tutorial
game_tutorial.roster_body: The graveyard shows who's dead and their revealed role. Next to it, the role list present in this match — useful to know what threats remain.
game_tutorial.role_body: This panel holds YOUR secret role, your goal, the actions you can take (at night or during the day), and a last will you can write — it gets read if you die.
game_tutorial.chat_body: Chat is your main weapon during the day. Ask questions, accuse, defend yourself. At night, only specific roles (Mafia, Cult) can write to each other.
game_tutorial.reset_tooltip: Re-enable the interactive tutorial for the next match
game_tutorial.reset_confirm: The interactive tutorial will appear at the start of the next game.

survey.title: Give me your feedback
survey.subtitle: Everything is optional — answer what you want, it really helps.
survey.question: Overall, did you enjoy this game?
survey.q_more_roles: Would you like more different roles?
survey.q_more_interactions: Would you like more interactions and animations during the game?
survey.q_interesting: Do you find the game interesting?
survey.ideas_title: Share improvement ideas or your thoughts
survey.submit_failed: Submission failed — your answer was saved locally.
survey.thanks_sub: Your feedback really matters and helps me improve the game.
